message:
test(cli,health): coverage boost — assignment logic, detectErrors branches

CLI: adds tests for calculateMatchConfidence (8 cases covering all agent
types, strategies, task patterns), buildReasoning (5 cases), and
summarizeAssignmentCounts.

Health: exercises remaining detectErrors branches — connection errors,
generic errors, crash-only, auth-only. Pushes detectErrors 84.2% → 94.7%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
